name: adult 7+ small bites chicken meal, barley & rice recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet adult 7+ small bites dry dog food is formulated for specific aging needs. provides easy-to-digest nutrition with a synergistic blend of ingredients to help support energy & activity level.  delicious chicken flavor in a small bite size for those that prefer variety. balanced minerals for heart & kidney health omega-6s & vitamin e for beautiful skin & coat high-quality protein for lean muscles
